summary: Match Scoring V2 frontend testing completed successfully. All three new V2 features verified: (1) Pipeline school cards showing match %, fit labels (Strong Fit/Possible Fit), and confidence levels; (2) School Detail page Match Breakdown section with sub-score bars, measurables detail, risk badges, and explanation; (3) Guidance banner with 'Improve your match accuracy' message and 'Update Profile' button. All features work correctly in both light and dark themes.
critical_code_review_comments: All V2 data-testid attributes correctly implemented: pipeline-hero-card, measurables-guidance-banner, update-profile-btn, match-breakdown-section, sub-scores-bars, breakdown-fit-label, breakdown-confidence, measurables-detail, risk-badges, breakdown-explanation
FIT_COLORS and CONFIDENCE_LABELS constants properly styled in both PipelinePage.js and SchoolDetailPage.js
Match scores fetched from /api/match-scores and correctly displayed on Pipeline cards and School Detail page
Guidance banner correctly shows confidence_guidance message from API
SUB_SCORE_COLORS provide visual differentiation for Division, Region, Priorities, Academics, and Measurables bars
context_for_next_testing_agent: Match Scoring V2 frontend features fully working. All 12 pipeline schools display V2 match data. Stanford detail page shows full Match Breakdown with sub-scores. Guidance banner appears when measurables are missing. Theme toggle works for all V2 elements.

Pipeline_Page_V2.hero_card_social_links: PASS - Twitter/X, Instagram, Facebook icons displayed
Pipeline_Page_V2.hero_card_explanation: PASS - 'Your height (5'10") is close to the typical D1 Outside Hitter range...' displayed
Pipeline_Page_V2.guidance_banner: PASS - 'Improve your match accuracy - Add approach touch and block touch to improve match accuracy'
Pipeline_Page_V2.filter_chips: PASS - All 12, Outreach 9, Upcoming 2, In Convo 1
Pipeline_Page_V2.school_cards_fit_labels: PASS - Strong Fit, Possible Fit badges visible
Pipeline_Page_V2.school_cards_confidence: PASS - Low Confidence displayed on cards

School_Detail_Page_V2.match_breakdown_section: PASS - Section visible with Target icon header
School_Detail_Page_V2.overall_match_pct: PASS - 64% displayed with 'Possible Fit' and 'Low Confidence'
School_Detail_Page_V2.explanation: PASS - Full explanation text with height analysis, division preference, academics

Theme_Compatibility.dark_mode: PASS - All V2 elements visible with proper contrast
Theme_Compatibility.light_mode: PASS - All V2 elements visible with proper contrast

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - /api/match-scores returns V2 data for all 12 pipeline schools
